channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Phil Gould praises Latrell Mitchell's remarkable career progression
item.description: The article details a conversation between NRL legend Phil Gould and Rabbitohs star Latrell Mitchell, discussing the latter's extraordinary journey from youth to becoming a key player in the National ...

item.title: NBI Officials Testify in Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: The Senate impeachment court, presided over by Sen. Francis 'Chiz' Escudero, has ordered the issuance of subpoenas for two National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) officials to appear in the impeachment...

item.title: Spain advances to quarter-finals with late goal against Portugal, ending Ronaldo's World Cup journey
item.description: In a tightly contested match at the Dallas Cowboys stadium, Spain secured a 1-0 victory over Portugal with a late goal from substitute Mikel Merino, marking the end of Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup ca...

item.title: Abuja Teachers Protest Delay in 2024 Promotions, Reject Vacancy Rule and Demand Career Progression
item.description: Scores of teachers under the Nigeria Union of Teachers (NUT), FCT Wing, staged a peaceful protest at the Open University in Dutse-Alhaji, Abuja, to express their dissatisfaction over the prolonged del...

item.title: Ogun Broadcaster's Murder: Court Orders 60-Day Remand for Three Suspects
item.description: The body of 67-year-old retired OGTV broadcaster Kitan Oyesiku was found inside her apartment in Agodo village, Abeokuta, on June 20. She was allegedly killed along with her security guard, Pelumi Ade...

item.title: Man critically injured in robotic vacuum explosion
item.description: A 25-year-old man, Lachie Perrem, is fighting for his life after suffering severe burns to approximately 75 per cent of his body in a robotic vacuum explosion at his home in Brabham, Perth. The incide...

item.title: Senator Bong Go provides relief to Davao fire victims
item.description: Senator Bong Go conducted weekend visits to fire-affected residents in Davao City, distributing aid to 152 families impacted by the June 23 fire in Barangay Ilang and 110 families affected by the June...

item.title: Mbappe Responds to Racist Abuse by Paraguayan Senator After World Cup Match
item.description: Kylian Mbappe, France's star player, called out a Paraguayan senator for racist remarks on social media following their World Cup clash. The senator, Celeste Amarilla, made offensive comments about Mb...

item.title: FIFA Disciplinary Committee Addresses Trump, Balogun, and UEFA Criticisms
item.description: The FIFA Disciplinary Committee has initiated an investigation into allegations of misconduct involving former U.S. President Donald Trump, Nigerian football federation president Amaju Pinnick Balogun...

item.title: Govt extends vehicle registration validity to three years for inter-state travel
item.description: The Indian government has proposed a policy allowing vehicle owners to register their cars for three years without re-registering when moving between states. This comes after the current law requires ...

item.title: Internal dissent within Alberta's UCP caucus over pipeline agreement with federal government
item.description: Former Alberta MLA Drew Barnes claims a significant portion of Premier Danielle Smith's United Conservative Party (UCP) caucus opposes the government's memorandum of understanding (MOU) with Prime Min...

item.title: Zamfara State Governor Distributes 50 Buses to NURTW, Commences Fire Truck Projects
item.description: Governor Dauda Lawal of Zamfara State has distributed 50 new buses to members of the National Union of Road Transport Workers (NURTW) under a state government vehicle loan scheme. The buses were hande...

item.title: Businessmen Co-Accused in Rodante Marcoleta's Plunder Case Arrested
item.description: Senator Rodante Marcoleta was arrested by the Sandiganbayan after a warrant was issued for his arrest in connection with a P75-million plunder case. The case alleges he received undeclared campaign do...

item.title: Actors Criticize Modern Presidency as Corporate Entity and Political Divisions
item.description: The article discusses Bryan Cranston's critique of the modern U.S. presidency, comparing it to a corporate CEO role where leaders exploit their position for financial gain. Cranston, an Emmy winner kn...

item.title: Spain Advances to World Cup Quarters with Narrow Victory Over Portugal
item.description: In a tightly contested match at Dallas Stadium, Spain secured a 1-0 victory over Portugal in the World Cup last 16, sending them to the quarterfinals. Substitute Mikel Merino scored in the 91st minute...

item.title: York police and CBSA seize 260 kg of cocaine valued at $20 million, arrest six suspects in drug trafficking operation
item.description: In a major law enforcement operation dubbed 'Project Golden Frog,' York Regional Police and the Canada Border Services Agency (CBSA) successfully intercepted 260 kilograms of cocaine with an estimated...

item.title: UK's withdrawal from Eurovision 2023 sparks controversy
item.description: The United Kingdom's decision to withdraw from the 2023 Eurovision Song Contest has ignited a significant debate among fans, industry experts, and political figures. The country, which has participate...

item.title: Mandatory Yoga Wellness Training for Seafarers Under Government Regulations
item.description: The Indian government has mandated that all seafarers holding a valid Continuous Discharge Certificate (CDC) complete a yoga-based wellness training program within one year. The initiative, named 'Sag...

item.title: Tragic Incident Involving Sister's Partner in Occidental Mindoro
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Occidental Mindoro where a young girl was found strangled and her body dumped in a creek. According to the news report, the suspect is identified as the partner of the vi...

item.title: Nova Scotia Tractor Fire Near Port Williams Quickly Contained by Firefighters
item.description: A tractor fire near Port Williams, Nova Scotia, was swiftly contained by local firefighters according to the fire chief. The incident, which occurred on July 6, 2026, involved a tractor catching fire ...
